title: Assemble new boxed bicycles for retail sale
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assemble new boxed bicycles for retail sale demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to assemble new bicycle

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret bicycle manufacturer assembly specifications and the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) product safety standards relating to bicycles 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.4 Select and check assembly tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Prepare work area and plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret bicycle manufacturer assembly specifications and the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) product safety standards relating to bicycles 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.4 Select and check assembly tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Prepare work area and plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret bicycle manufacturer assembly specifications and the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) product safety standards relating to bicycles 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.4 Select and check assembly tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Prepare work area and plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to assemble new bicycle

elements.title: Assemble bicycle

pcs.text: Unpack bicycle and check to ensure all components are included and not damaged2.2 Report missing or damaged components according to workplace procedures2.3 Assemble and lubricate bicycle and components, and adjust fastener tensions according to assembly plan, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.4 Inspect and test assembled bicycle for required tension of components and operation, and adjust as required according to workplace procedures2.5 Check assembly to ensure it complies with ACCC product safety standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Unpack bicycle and check to ensure all components are included and not damaged2.2 Report missing or damaged components according to workplace procedures2.3 Assemble and lubricate bicycle and components, and adjust fastener tensions according to assembly plan, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.4 Inspect and test assembled bicycle for required tension of components and operation, and adjust as required according to workplace procedures2.5 Check assembly to ensure it complies with ACCC product safety standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Unpack bicycle and check to ensure all components are included and not damaged2.2 Report missing or damaged components according to workplace procedures2.3 Assemble and lubricate bicycle and components, and adjust fastener tensions according to assembly plan, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.4 Inspect and test assembled bicycle for required tension of components and operation, and adjust as required according to workplace procedures2.5 Check assembly to ensure it complies with ACCC product safety standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assemble bicycle

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
